title: Flu
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Flu symptoms can include fever or chills, cough, sore throat, runny or stuffy nose, body aches, headache, fatigue, and sometimes vomiting or diarrhea.
Flu can be confused with other respiratory illnesses.
Home care is supportive for many mild cases, but severe or worsening symptoms need medical evaluation.
